# rotation

**Instance Property**

The affine transform’s rotation.

## Declaration

```swift
var rotation: Rotation3DFloat? { get }
```

## Discussion

This function can’t extract rotation from a non-scale-rotate-translate affine transform. In that case, the function returns `nil`.
title: rotation
